- Rows 40-44: cols 19-23, 24-28, 29-33, 34-38, 39-43, 44-48, 49-53 (valid, within charcoal region)

Let me try to figure out the goal. The cross is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22. When the blocks overlap with the cross, the cross disappears. But the level doesn't complete.
